pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Welcome, {player_name}! I am Professor Sole, the world's foremost expert on Sneaker culture.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: This world is inhabited by creatures called Sneakers! Some collect them as a hobby...

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Others use them for battle. Myself — I study them professionally. Now, are you ready to choose your first partner?

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Excellent! Three Sneakers await you. Each has its own Faction and personality. Choose wisely — your journey begins here!

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: A fine choice, {player_name}! Take good care of your new partner.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Your rival {rival_name} already chose their starter. Head north through Route 1 when you're ready!
